stories.title: New twist on ‘Hi Mum’ scam sees criminals impersonating parents in text messages
stories.summary: North Wales Police have warned residents to be on guard for text messages that appear to come from a parent claiming to have lost or forgotten their bank card and asking for money. NWP Cyber Crime issued the warning after seeing a rise in reports of the scam, in which fraudsters pose as a parent

stories.title: Mold man charged with GBH and intentional strangulation following domestic violence incident
stories.summary: A 43-year-old man from Mold has been charged with causing grievous bodily harm with intent and intentional strangulation following an alleged domestic violence incident on 3 February. Richard Davies, of Bank Villas, Mold, appeared before Mold Magistrates Court on Saturday, 18 April. He was remanded in custody and is due to appear before Mold Crown

stories.title: Roadworks across Flintshire this week: closures and traffic lights affecting routes across the county
stories.summary: A number of road closures and temporary traffic lights are in place across Flintshire this week, affecting routes in Shotton, Buckley, Connah’s Quay, Holywell, Flint, Mold and surrounding areas. stories.title: Greenfield Valley parkrun invites walkers to join this Saturday’s parkwalk day
stories.summary: Greenfield Valley parkrun is welcoming walkers of all abilities this Saturday, 25 April, as part of parkwalk day — an annual event designed to encourage people to take part regardless of fitness level. stories.title: Residents can question HyNet project team at Hawarden event this Wednesday
stories.summary: Residents in Flintshire can meet the team behind the HyNet CO2 pipeline at a public drop-in event in Hawarden this week, with construction work already under way across parts of the county.
